name: Coles-Moultrie Electric Cooperative
territory: Coles, Moultrie, and parts of Douglas and Shelby counties, Illinois

netMetering.policy: Net metering at retail rate for systems ≤ 40 kW
netMetering.notes: Illinois Net Metering Act (220 ILCS 5/16-107.5) applies

interconnection.applicationFeeNotes: Residential ≤ 10 kW; systems > 10 kW require additional engineering review

incentives.notes: Illinois Shines (ABP) available; USDA REAP grants for agricultural installations
